description.en: This function implements the standard .mo file search algorithm. It takes a domain, identical to what textdomain() takes. Optional localedir is as in bindtextdomain(). Optional languages is a list of strings, where each string is a language code. If localedir is not given, then the default system locale directory is used. [2] If languages is not given, then the following environment variables are searched: LANGUAGE, LC_ALL, LC_MESSAGES, and LANG. The first one returning a non-empty value is u...
